calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Alisa Kim, Esq., T:510736.6293, specially appearing for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Petition For Transfer Of Payment Rights is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown per declaration of J. Enigbokan, Trustee.
Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
